name.en-US: ELT-Lite Elsys LoRaWAN Lite Multipurpose Sensor
name.pt-BR: ELT-Lite Sensor Multiuso Lite LoRaWAN Elsys

description.en-US: Elsys ELT-Lite — LoRaWAN (Class A) indoor sensor that monitors temperature and humidity. Uplinks are Elsys TLV frames on FPort 5.
description.pt-BR: Elsys ELT-Lite — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) de ambiente interno que monitora temperatura e umidade. Os uplinks são quadros TLV Elsys no FPort 5.
